    Method
    Description
    Account
    AccountNumberMap.get(String accountNumber)
    Retrieves an account by its account number.
    Account
    AccountingEntry.getAccount()
    Retrieves the Account object associated with this entry's account number from the current company's chart of accounts.

    ChartOfAccounts.getAccount(String accountNumber)
    Retrieves a specific Account from the chart by its account number.

    Method
    Description
    Map<String,Account>

    Returns an unmodifiable view of the underlying map.
    List<Account>
    ChartOfAccounts.getAccounts()
    Returns a list of all accounts contained in this chart of accounts.
    List<Account>
    ChartOfAccounts.getChildren(Account parent)
    Returns a list of accounts that are direct children of the specified parent account.
    List<Account>
    ChartOfAccounts.getRootAccounts()
    Returns a list of every account that does not have a parent account.

    Account.values()
    Returns a one-element collection containing this account.

    Method

    ChartOfAccounts.getChildren(Account parent)
    Returns a list of accounts that are direct children of the specified parent account.

    Removes the specified target account and all its descendants (if any) from the chart.

  • Uses of Account in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

    Methods in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx with parameters of type Account
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static BigDecimal
    InvestmentTransaction.getTotal(Account account)
    Calculates the total amount of the transaction for a given account by summing the totals of all InvestmentTransaction objects stored in that account's transaction list.

    Method

    AccountRepository.listAll()

    Method
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) void
    AccountRepository.replaceAll(Connection c, List<Account> accounts)
    Performs the replacement of all account rows using the provided connection.
    void
    AccountRepository.replaceAll(List<Account> accounts)
    Atomically replaces all accounts with the supplied collection, resetting existing fund associations in the process.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Account
    FileImportService.findAccountIgnoreCase(ChartOfAccounts chart, String name)
    Searches the entire ChartOfAccounts for an account whose name matches the provided value, ignoring case and trimming whitespace.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Retrieves a list of direct children for the given parent account.

    ChartOfAccountsService.findByNumber(String num)
    Finds the first account whose account number matches the provided num.

    AccountService.getAllAccounts()
    Retrieves all accounts currently managed by this service.

    FundAccountingService.listAccounts()
    Retrieves a list of all accounts currently managed by this service.

    ChartOfAccountsService.roots()
    Retrieves a list of all root accounts (accounts without a parent) from the chart of accounts.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    AccountService.addAccount(Account account)

    ReportService.calculateBalanceForAccount(Account account, Collection<AccountingEntry> entries)

    Retrieves a list of direct children for the given parent account.
    void
    ChartOfAccountsService.delete(Account det)
    Deletes the specified account and all its descendants from the chart of accounts.

    FileExportService.exportAccountStatement(File destination, Company company, Account account, FileExportService.StatementFormat format)
    Exports all transactions for the supplied account to an OFX/QFX file.

    FileImportService.importOFXorQIFFile(File file, Account targetAccountInCOA, ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts, Ledger ledger)
    Imports transactions from a specified file (OFX or QIF) and maps them to accounting transactions.
